Term.definition: The difference in position between two elements, often used to find neighboring cells in grids.
Variables that belong to an instance of a class, storing data unique to that instance.
An outline or summary of topics to be covered in a course or training program.
A variable shared by all instances of a class, defined within the class body.
Objects created from a class, each with unique data but sharing the class's methods.
A menu that appears upon user interaction, offering relevant actions for the selected item or area.
A function defined inside a class, operating on instances of that class.
A blueprint for creating objects, encapsulating data and behavior together.
A collection of key-value pairs, allowing fast lookup of values by keys.
A data structure that stores items in a last-in, first-out (LIFO) order.
A method that removes and returns the last item from a list or stack.
A data type with only two possible values: True or False.
A variable shared by all instances of a class, defined within the class but outside methods.
A comparison showing the differences between two versions of code or text files.
Integrated Development Environment; software for writing, running, and debugging code efficiently.
A function defined inside a class, called on objects of that class.
A blueprint for creating objects, defining their attributes and behaviors.
An instance of a class containing data and methods.
A file containing Python code, such as functions and classes, to be imported and used elsewhere.
A blueprint for creating objects, defining their properties and behaviors in object-oriented programming.
A function defined within a class and called on its instances.
An instance of a class containing data and behavior defined by the class.
An immutable, ordered collection of items, written as values separated by commas inside parentheses.
A collection of key-value pairs, allowing fast lookup of values by keys in Python.
A technique for solving problems by exploring possible options and undoing choices when a dead end is reached.
A fundamental part of data structures like trees and graphs, representing a single element or point.
Integrated Development Environment; software for writing, testing, and debugging code in one application.
